arts.ttl: Man United boss Ruben Amorim gives update on future of Marcus Rashford and Antony as on-loan pair continue to impress away from Old Trafford
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim was reluctant to be drawn over whether Marcus Rashford and Antony could be given a second chance under him at Manchester United when their loan spells end this summer.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim gives telling Bruno Fernandes update amid Real Madrid transfer link
arts.sum: Manchester United manager Ruben Amorim insists Bruno Fernandes will not be leaving Old Trafford this summer despite reports of interest from Real Madrid

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim tells Man Utd captain Bruno Fernandes he is ‘not going anywhere’
arts.sum: The 30-year-old has arguably been the best signing of the post-Sir Alex Ferguson era.

arts.ttl: Amorim insists Fernandes not leaving Manchester United amid Madrid reports
arts.sum: Manager says captain is crucial to challenge for titles Harry Maguire and Leny Yoro fit for Forest trip Ruben Amorim has said Bruno Fernandes is “not going anywhere” this summer after Manchester United’s captain was linked with a move to Real Madrid. Fernandes has again been United’s standout player this season, scoring 16 goals in 44 matches, including seven in the past seven games. In 277 United appearances Fernandes has 95 goals and 81 assists. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: I've told Fernandes he is going nowhere - Amorim
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim says he has told Bruno Fernandes he will not allow him to leave this summer.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim provides update on Bruno Fernandes future: ‘It’s not going to happen’
arts.sum: The Manchester United captain is a reported target for Real Madrid

arts.ttl: The two Man United players handing Ruben Amorim an awkward dilemma
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim has a lengthy in-tray of issues come the summer – and two players’ futures are top of that list

arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest boss Nuno Espirito Santo explains why the Premier League's 'big six' era is coming to an end... and claims the 'gap no longer exists' ahead of Man United clash
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest face Manchester United - a member of the 'big six' group - at the City Ground on Tuesday, aiming to boost their bid for Champions League football next season.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim addresses Bruno Fernandes' future amid talk of Real Madrid lining up £90m bid for the Manchester United captain
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim insists Manchester United can satisfy Bruno Fernandes' ambitions, and has ruled out any chance of his captain leaving Old Trafford this summer.

arts.ttl: Manchester United youngsters suffer penalty heartbreak after surprising Chido Obi decision
arts.sum: Man Utd U18s crashed out of the FA Youth Cup on penalties after giving their all on the pitch for a gruelling 120 minutes.
